About the Book

A story that turns kids into tiny money wizards ✨

🧒 For Young Readers
🪙
Learn why earning feels WAY better than asking — with Uncle Money's secret jobs board!
🐷
Discover the 3 magic jars: Spend, Save & Give — and watch money grow like a beanstalk.
🎯
Set real money goals and check them off — with activities included!
🚀
Fun challenges every chapter that kids can try at home TODAY.
👨‍👩‍👧 For Parents
📖
Age-appropriate language — no jargon, just joy. Perfect for read-aloud or solo reading.
💡
Discussion prompts at the end spark real money conversations at home.
✅
Aligned with core financial literacy standards for elementary grades.
📄 Full Color 🎨 Illustrated 📚 Ages 6–10

Meet the Author

[Author Name]

📚 Children's Author · 💡 Financial Literacy Advocate · 🎨 Illustrator

[Author Name] grew up counting coins in a jar by the window — and never stopped. A passionate educator and storytelling nerd, they've spent years finding ways to make financial concepts feel like pure, joyful adventure for young readers. Little Uncle Money is their debut children's book, born from years of classroom experience and a burning belief that every kid deserves to feel confident about money.

📌 "I wrote Uncle Money because I wanted kids to feel that little spark — that electric moment when you realize money isn't just something grown-ups stress about. It's YOUR superpower, too."
— [Author Name]
